intended_rule: Reduce SOXL leveraged exposure after executable threshold break; no SOXL re-add allowed.
actual_execution: Confirmed sell 3 shares of SOXL at 248.00 USD at 2026-06-04 17:32 SGT/BJT. Position before execution was 5 shares and position after execution is 2 shares.
account_risk_improvement: SOXL leveraged ETF exposure was reduced by 60%, from 5 shares to 2 shares. Cash increased by about 744 USD, matching 3 x 248.00 USD.
short_term_price_outcome: Not the main evaluation metric. Execution correctness is judged by rule compliance, cash improvement, and exposure reduction rather than short-term SOXL price movement after the fill.
review_conclusion: Confirmed and reconciled. The SOXL sale was rule-compliant risk reduction and is reflected in both position size and cash balance.
lessons_learned: Confirmed Execution Reconciliation should connect trigger, order fill, position after execution, and cash delta.
Expected cash delta was 744.00 USD from 3 shares x 248.00 USD.
Actual cash moved from about 3,511.18 USD to about 4,255.18 USD, consistent with the expected cash delta.
Realized vs Unrealized Risk Tracking must judge execution by rule compliance and risk reduction, not hindsight price movement.
SOXL transitioned from primary risk valve to residual watch position.
next_rule_update: Current SOXL position is 2 shares. Do not add. If SOXL falls below 240, sell remaining 2 shares. If SOXL rebounds to 255-260, temporarily hold remaining 2 shares. If SOXL rebounds to 265-270 but NVDA remains weak, consider selling 1-2 shares.
